name: @bpmn-react/library-react
description: React UI for the generic BuildToValue library (Handoff 6 S-3): gallery with status/type filter chips, search, artifact cards and the detail drawer — all generic, driven exclusively by the ArtifactAdapter contract. Workspace-only — the publish scope awaits pendencias.md §1. Zero runtime dependencies beyond @bpmn-react/*.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
